case_title: UNIFUND CCR, LLC VS. ADRIAN S. BAUTISTA et al

docket_entries.description: GENERAL DENIAL FILED BY DEFENDANT BAUTISTA, ADRIAN S.

DISCOVERY, 302, (AMENDED) MTN FOR ORDER TO DEEM MATTERS ADMITTED IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR. MOVING PARTY FAILED TO PROVIDE THE COURT WITH COMPLETE COURTESY COPIES AS REQUIRED BY THE TENTATIVE RULING OF AUGUST 14, 2014. JUDGE PRO TEM: DENNIS HYDE; CLERK: FELICIA GREEN; NOT REPORTED; DEPT. 302.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR MAY-21-2014 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

(AMENDED) NTC OF MTN AND MTN FOR ORDER TO DEEM MATTERS ADMITTED, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF UNIFUND CCR, LLC A LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY HEARING SET FOR AUG-14-2014 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 302

DISCOVERY 302, PLAINTIFF UNIFUND CCR, LLC (AMENDED) MTN FOR ORDER TO DEEM MATTERS ADMITTED IS CONDITIONALLY CONTINUED TO SEP-11-2014, AT 9:00 A.M, IN DEPT. 302, DISCOVERY DEPT. THE COURTESY COPIES PROVIDED TO THE COURT ARE INCOMPLETE. MOVING PARTY MUST CONFIRM THAT THE ORIGINAL MOVING PAPERS AS FILED AND SERVED WERE COMPLETE. IF THE MOVING PAPERS AS FILED AND SERVED ARE CONFIRMED TO HAVE BEEN COMPLETE, THEN THE HEARING IS CONTINUED TO SEPTEMBER 11, 2014 AND COMPLETE COURTESY COPIES MUST BE PROVIDED TO DEPARTMENT 302 BY AUGUST 21, 2014, REFERENCING THE CONTINUED HEARING DATE OF SEPTEMBER 11, 2014. IF THE MOVING PAPERS AS FILED AND/OR SERVED WERE INCOMPLETE, THIS MOTION WILL BE TAKEN OFF CALENDAR. JUDGE PRO TEM: DENNIS HYDE; CLERK: FELICIA GREEN; NOT REPORTED; DEPT. 302.

REMOVED FROM MASTER COURT CALENDAR SET FOR SEP-15-2014 - ***CASE IS DISMISSED.*** BRANDON TANG APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF. NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ORDERED THE MATTER DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE PER REPRESENTATION OF PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL. JUDGE: CYNTHIA M. LEE; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL, COURT TRIAL SET FOR SEP-15-2014 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 206. CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE ON MAY-21-2014 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Sep-15-2014 Dismissal - No Appearance

(Amended) Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Order To Deem Matters Admitted
Off Calendar Sep-11-2014 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

PLAINTIFF UNIFUND CCR, LLC (Amended) Mtn For Order To Deem Matters Admitted is taken off calendar. Moving party failed to provide the court with complete courtesy copies as required by the tentative ruling of August 14, 2014. Judge Pro Tem: Dennis Hyde; Clerk: Felicia Green; Not reported; Dept. 302.

(Amended) Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Order To Deem Matters Admitted
Off Calendar Aug-14-2014 Continued To Sep-11-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

PLAINTIFF UNIFUND CCR, LLC (Amended) Mtn For Order To Deem Matters Admitted is conditionally continued to September 11, 2014, at 9:00 a.m. The courtesy copies provided to the court are incomplete. Moving party must confirm that the original moving papers as filed and served were complete. If the moving papers as filed and served are confirmed to have been complete, then the hearing is continued to September 11, 2014 and complete courtesy copies must be provided to Department 302 by August 21, 2014, referencing the continued hearing date of September 11, 2014. If the moving papers as filed and/or served were incomplete, this motion will be taken off calendar. Judge Pro Tem: Dennis Hyde; Clerk: Felicia Green; Not reported; Dept. 302.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-05-2014 Set For Trial On Sep-15-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
